title: cephalaria balansae
intro: Cephalaria balansae, also known as Balansa's cephalaria or Balansa's heliopsis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Cephalaria balansae can be prepared into various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments.
